title: hello
description: MUST be the first envelope sent on a new connection, in both directions. A connecting device sends a `stage: offer` hello; the server responds with a `stage: accept` hello carrying the negotiated version. No other envelope type may precede hello on either side.

offer.description: Sent by the connecting device (source or viewer).

protocol_versions.description: Every protocol major version this device can speak, ascending, no duplicates.

capabilities.description: Optional feature flags this device understands. Unknown flags MUST be ignored by the peer.

accept.description: Sent by the server once it has chosen a protocol_version from the offer's intersection with its own supported set. If the intersection is empty the server MUST instead send `error` with code `version_unsupported` and close the connection; it MUST NOT send this envelope in that case.

session_id.description: Server-assigned identifier for this connection instance, for logging/observability only. Not a credential and not required for resume (see `resume`, which is keyed by space revision instead).

heartbeat_interval_ms.description: Interval at which the server will emit a bare `ping` text frame on this connection. Informative; the peer MAY also send its own `ping`s.
